---
name: New bank or plugin request
about: Request support for a new bank/source or discuss whether it should be built-in or external
title: "[plugin] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Source / institution

Which bank/source is this for?

## What kind of integration is this?

- [ ] broadly useful; could belong as a built-in plugin
- [ ] niche/private; probably better as a third-party plugin
- [ ] not sure

## Email format details

What does the notification look like?

Please describe:
- sender
- subject pattern
- key body labels/markers
- whether there are multiple variants

## Can you provide sanitized fixtures?

- [ ] yes
- [ ] maybe
- [ ] no

If yes, describe what you can share safely.
Do not paste secrets, raw inbox exports, full card numbers, personal data, or real transaction details.

## Matching concerns

Could this format overlap with an existing plugin?
If yes, which one?

## Config / workflow notes

Do you rely on:
- Gmail labels?
- sender filtering?
- a custom base query?
- special account mapping needs?

## Additional context

Anything else that would help evaluate whether this should be built-in or external?
